name: Apollo 247 Health Insurance - Member Selection Validation

steps.name: User navigates to Health Insurance page and enter pincode "601201"

elements.name: Verify multiple member selection (Self, Wife, Father)/ // .

steps.name: User selects Gender "Female" "Self" at age "28", "Husband" at age "25", and "Father"  at age "55" as members
Family insurance plans should be displayed correctly
